channel.title: Events on StageSet Controller
channel.description: Recent content in Events on StageSet Controller

item.title: Alerting
item.description:
Two layers surface trouble: Kubernetes Events the controller emits on a StageSet’s own timeline, and a Prometheus alert set built on the metrics . Both lead an operator to a runbook .

These alerts page on the causes of trouble. To alert on a service-level objective directly, and to see availability, error budget, and latency against their objectives, use the published dashboard .

The controller binary

Kubernetes Events

On a StageSet’s condition transitions and notable actions, the controller emits standard Kubernetes Events (events.v1) against the StageSet object. The reason fills both the Event reason and action slots. Read them with:
